mapper.select:
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 2 AND UPDATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND UPDATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(UPDATED_AT,'DD')

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT,'D')) AS DAY_NUM, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT,'D')) ORDER BY DAY_NUM

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT,'MM')) AS MONTH_NUM, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT,'MM')) ORDER BY MONTH_NUM

SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') - NUMTOYMINTERVAL(12 - LV,'MONTH'),'YYYY.MM') AS DT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE CREATED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') - NUMTOYMINTERVAL(12 - LV,'MONTH') + NUMTOYMINTERVAL(1,'MONTH') ) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT LEVEL AS LV FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ) ORDER BY DT

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE STATUS = '마감' AND DEADLINE_AT IS NOT NULL AND DEADLINE_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND DEADLINE_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'MM') TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'IW') TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'MM') TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'IW') TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT,'DD')

SELECT SALARY_RANGE AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SALARY IS NULL THEN '미정' WHEN SALARY < 2000 THEN '~200' WHEN SALARY < 3000 THEN '200~300' WHEN SALARY < 4000 THEN '300~400' WHEN SALARY < 5000 THEN '400~500' WHEN SALARY < 6000 THEN '500~600' ELSE '600+' END AS SALARY_RANGE FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE STATUS = '진행중' ) GROUP BY SALARY_RANGE ORDER BY CASE SALARY_RANGE WHEN '~200' THEN 1 WHEN '200~300' THEN 2 WHEN '300~400' THEN 3 WHEN '400~500' THEN 4 WHEN '500~600' THEN 5 WHEN '600+' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM'),'YYYY.MM') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW'),'MM/DD') TO_CHAR(TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD'),'MM/DD')
AS DT, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND FK_PARENT_COMMENT_ID IS NULL AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{from},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')
ORDER BY
TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'MM') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'IW') TRUNC(CREATED_AT,'DD')
